message:
fix: remove restrictive systemd sandboxing

Stockyard needs broad system access for VMs, ZFS, networking,
and DHCP. The ProtectSystem=strict and CapabilityBoundingSet
were preventing dnsmasq from binding to port 67.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,14 +18,12 @@ RuntimeDirectoryMode=0755
 StateDirectory=stockyard
 StateDirectoryMode=0755
 
-# Security hardening
-NoNewPrivileges=false
-ProtectSystem=strict
-ProtectHome=read-only
-ReadWritePaths=/var/lib/stockyard /var/run/stockyard /tmp
-# Needs network and ZFS access
-PrivateNetwork=false
-CapabilityBoundingSet=CAP_NET_ADMIN CAP_SYS_ADMIN CAP_MKNOD CAP_KILL
+# Stockyard needs broad system access for:
+# - Firecracker VMs (requires /dev access, process management)
+# - ZFS datasets (requires zfs commands)
+# - Network bridges and TAP interfaces
+# - DHCP server (dnsmasq binds to port 67)
+# Minimal sandboxing is applied
 
 [Install]
 WantedBy=multi-user.target
